title: Introducing FR+ 🚀
excerpt: FR+ replaces VIP with a completely redesigned membership, massive performance improvements, dozens of bug fixes, popup upgrades, sorting systems, and major quality-of-life improvements for users with large friends lists.
body:
We might have cooked our biggest update ever.

VIP has officially been retired and replaced with FR+, a completely redesigned premium membership packed with exclusive features for a one-time purchase of just 115 Robux.

Alongside FR+, we've spent weeks fixing bugs reported by the community, improving extension performance, redesigning menus, and making Friends Remover significantly faster and more reliable for users with large friends lists.

added.moreInfo: VIP has been completely replaced with FR+, a redesigned premium membership featuring exclusive tools, perks, and future updates for a one-time purchase of 115 Robux.
Scheduled removals have been moved out of settings and are now managed directly inside the popup for a cleaner experience.
You can now sort friends inside the popup based on their status, making it easier to organize and manage your friends list.
A brand-new Roblox group has been created for the Friends Remover community.

removed.moreInfo: The old VIP system has been fully retired and replaced by FR+.
Scheduled removals are no longer configured through settings.
The custom theme builder has been removed.
The old fallback system used to detect mobile-sized windows has been removed.
All rounded corners and radius styling have been removed from settings elements.

fixed.moreInfo: Dynamic Pins were not functioning correctly and have now been fully fixed.
The Clear All button in popup was not working properly and has been fixed.
The refresh button located inside the three-dots menu now properly refreshes data.
The extension could become stuck forever on the loading screen. It now times out after 20 seconds and displays an error instead.
Friend usernames are now safely handled to prevent malicious content from being injected into the extension.
Automatic background removals now generate a single summary notification instead of spamming multiple notifications.
Pinned users can no longer be removed through the Roblox context menu. The extension now checks pinned status before any removal action.
Attempting to remove users who are not actually your friend now displays a proper error instead of incorrectly reporting success.
Friends scheduled for future actions can no longer be accidentally removed by background removal systems.

improved.moreInfo: Friends load significantly faster. Profile information and avatars are fetched simultaneously, and the friends list now appears before online statuses finish loading.
Reduce Animations now disables animated game backgrounds and popup header animations for improved performance.
Users with over 400 friends will now automatically have Reduce Animations permanently enabled.
The menu has been redesigned and now uses your active theme color instead of a semi-transparent black background.
Game titles shown in popup statuses now truncate after 23 characters for a cleaner appearance.
The popup now remembers where you were and returns you to that page after reopening.
Avatar puzzle verifications have been dramatically reduced and now only appear in genuinely unusual situations.
The Friends Remover logo displayed throughout settings has been increased in size for better visibility and a cleaner appearance.

other.text: Block Mode is now exclusive to FR+ members
Scheduled Removals are now exclusive to FR+ members

other: Massive performance improvements throughout the entire extension
Dozens of community-reported bugs have been fixed
Large friends lists now perform significantly better than before
